'''23X''' was the designation of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Tactical Enforcer]] (AT-TE), a [[Walker/Legends|walker]]<ref name="card" /> designed by [[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|Rothana Heavy Engineering]] and produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].<ref name="PrimaBF2" /> Deployed in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] against the secessionist [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]],<ref name="date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the walker was one of numerous weapons and vehicles acquired by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], who had delayed his arrival to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] to retrieve these military supplies.<ref name="card" /> Like all AT-TE walkers, 23X was 13.2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length,<ref name="SWCP" /> 5.32 meters wide and 5.02 meters tall.<ref name="CCS" /> It could achieve a maximum speed of 60 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|km/h]]<ref name="FF" /> and had a cargo capacity of 10 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]].<ref name="TCWCG" /> Armed with six [[anti-personnel laser cannon]]s and a single [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass-driver cannon]], the walker was manned by at least four crew members—a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], a spotter<ref name="FF" /> and at least two [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]]/[[technician]]s.<ref name="gunner note" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Jedi Master Yoda delayed his arrival on Geonosis to acquire weapons and vehicles, including this assault walker.|AT-TE Walker 23X flavour text|<ref name="card" />}}
AT-TE Walker 23X was the subject of a card released in [[2002]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for the [[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]'s first expansion, [[Attack of the Clones (TCG)|Attack of the Clones]].<ref name="card" />
